offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual payroll data handling causes compliance delays. We automate tax compliance reporting instead of manual data entry and filing.
problem: manual payroll data handling leads to compliance delays
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about payroll
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try tax compliance report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing payroll data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline steps in the onboarding process
